form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr5) over 2125m at this track, at the bell was 9th-12.98 beaten 17 m by Rudy Gee (2:35.50) in NR up to 63 on March 26 at $41. Before that, 8th (Fr1) over 2030m after showing early pace at Newcastle, at the bell was leading 1.66 beaten 15 m by Illawong Danny (2:26.90) in NR 59 to 63 on March 19 at $4.40. The ace draw can spark a return to form.
